statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); dir=$(basename "$cwd"); if git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'detached'); if [ -n "$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then dirty='✗'; else dirty=''; fi; git_info=" git:($branch) $dirty"; else git_info=''; fi; if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then py_ver=$(python3 --version 2>&1 | cut -d' ' -f2); py_info=" 🐍 $py_ver"; else py_info=''; fi; printf '\033[1;34m⚡\033[0m \033[36m%s\033[0m%s%s' "$dir" "$git_info" "$py_info"
